parents.subject: LU-10858 build: handle yaml library packaging on SLES systems

commit.subject: LU-10856 utils: delay "lfs getstripe -M" deprecation
commit.message:
LU-10856 utils: delay "lfs getstripe -M" deprecation

The "lfs getstripe -M" and "lfs mv -M" options were replaced by "-m"
in the 2.9.0 release and a deprecation warning added.

Delay the '-M' option deprecation until 2.12 to allow more time to
clean up the test scripts.

Fixes: 5fee5b700d1e683d165fc0ef0ae88c2a0ab83681

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=recovery-small,replay-dual
Test-Parameters: testlist=replay-single,sanity-flr,sanity-hsm
Test-Parameters: testlist=testlist=sanity,sanityn
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Change-Id: I9c1ca3947642383f1637d57b334d5035af3b3b7b
